name: Dark Shard Amulet
description:
This amulet is fashioned from a single shard of resilient extraplanar material originating from the realm of your warlock patron. While you are wearing it, you gain the following benefits:
{"type": "list", "items": ["You can use the amulet as a spellcasting focus for your warlock spells.", "You can try to cast a cantrip that you don't know. The cantrip must be on the warlock spell list, and you must make a {@dc 10} Intelligence ({@skill Arcana}) check. If the check succeeds, you cast the spell.
